research_topic: Cross-Origin Iframe Authentication, Session Continuity & Multi-Page Embedding

covered_apps.name: SonarQube
issues: Hardcodes X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN — cannot embed without reverse proxy
Uses window.alert() on login failure — blocked in cross-origin iframe
CSRF tokens refresh on every navigation — back/forward causes 403s
Session cookies lack SameSite=None — blocked as third-party
solutions: Strip X-Frame-Options via NGINX proxy, add frame-ancestors CSP
Override window.alert() via injected script (styled overlay)
postMessage token bridge to sync CSRF tokens
Rewrite Set-Cookie to add SameSite=None; Secure

covered_apps.name: Generic Self-Hosted App (Jellyfin, *arr, etc.)
issues: May or may not set CSP headers
Some use basic auth popup, some use cookie-based sessions
Multi-page navigation resets parent loading state
solutions: Consistent reverse proxy pattern for all embedded apps
Navigation observer injected via proxy to notify parent
Parent component state machine (loading → active → navigating → active)

key_technologies.name: CSP frame-ancestors
key_technologies.usage: HTTP header on embedded app allowinglist parent domains

key_technologies.name: SameSite=None; Secure
key_technologies.usage: Required for any cookie sent in cross-origin iframe context

key_technologies.name: CHIPS (Partitioned)
key_technologies.usage: Opts cookies into partitioned storage per top-level site
key_technologies.tradeoff: Isolates iframe session from direct-tab session

key_technologies.name: Storage Access API
key_technologies.usage: Request unpartitioned cookie access in Safari/ITP browsers

key_technologies.name: FedCM
key_technologies.usage: Privacy-preserving federated identity without third-party cookies
key_technologies.status: Chrome: stable, Safari: experimental, Firefox: in dev

key_technologies.name: postMessage
key_technologies.usage: Cross-origin communication between iframe and parent
key_technologies.critical_requirement: Always verify event.origin — failing to do so is an XSS vector

browser_strategies.Chrome/Edge: SameSite=None; Secure + proxy rewrite. No user interaction needed.
browser_strategies.Safari: Must call document.requestStorageAccess() after user gesture. Show click-to-enable overlay if first attempt fails.
browser_strategies.Firefox: Strict third-party cookie blocking by default. Use Storage Access API + fallback 'Open in new tab' link.
browser_strategies.Brave: Same as Chrome. Shields may need per-site disabling.
